name: Shizuku Kurogane
description:
**Ranking:** A-Rank

Ikki Kurogane's younger sister. Unlike her older brother, she was well-respected as a child and was even forgiven due to her talent as a Blazer and was the only person in their family who didn't despise or look down on Ikki for being an F-Rank Blazer and was saddened after he left.
